judge_reason: Description B invents specific handwritten text ('FIGHT PATH', 'see 130') on a white border that is not mentioned in Description A, creating a direct contradiction about the presence and content of these visual elements.
original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph, seemingly a night or low-light exposure. The image is predominantly dark. A distinct, faint horizontal line composed of small, discrete points of light or dashes crosses the center of the frame. Above this line, slightly to the left of the center, is a single, brighter, elongated point of light. There are a few other very faint specks in the frame.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A dark monochrome photograph of the night sky with a thin horizontal light trail across the middle and a few small bright points; the image is mounted on a white border labeled “Flight Path” along the left edge and “Sec 130” at the bottom.*
